stories.headline: MEDIA ALERT: The Pokémon Company International Reveals Product Lineup for Commemorative Pokémon Trading Card Game: 30th Celebration Expansion - Pokemon Press

stories.headline: France's 'most beautiful girl in the world' Thylane Blondeau is off the market - USA Today
stories.summary: Thylane Blondeau, who came to fame as a child when she was dubbed "the most beautiful little girl in the world," has married actor Ben Attal in Paris.

stories.headline: Cause of death revealed for ‘Lilo and Stitch’ voice actor Daveigh Chase - AZ Family
stories.summary: Former child actor Daveigh Chase, known for her youthful voice in Disney's “Lilo & Stitch” and her villainous performance in the thriller “The Ring," has died. She was 35.

stories.headline: Colin Farrell, Steve Coogan, Charlie Heaton, Domhnall Gleeson Join Netflix Period Thriller ‘Bad Bridgets’ - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: Himesh Patel, Niamh Algar and Simone Kirby also join Emilia Jones and Alison Oliver in the Irish revenge movie from 'Kneecap' filmmaker Rich Peppiatt, inspired by a history book about Irish women emi…

stories.headline: Louis C.K. Re-Enters the Mainstream With Caustic Netflix Special ‘Ridiculous’: TV Review - Variety
stories.summary: Louis C.K.'s Netflix special 'Ridiculous', his first on the streaming service since his sexual misconduct emerged in 2017, is a caustic comeback.

stories.headline: Armie Hammer's 'Citizen Vigilante' Secures Worldwide Distribution - Variety
stories.summary: Quiver has taken worldwide rights, excluding U.K., German-speaking territories, South Korea and Taiwan, to Armie Hammer’s 'Citizen Vigilante.'

stories.headline: Elliot Page shows off insane abs in shirtless boxing photos and video - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: 'The Odyssey' star Elliot Page says he's 'hooked' on boxing and shows off his ripped abs.
